_comment: Golden retrieval set: each question lists the page(s) that actually answer it. Used by `python -m pdf_qa.eval` to measure recall@k / MRR and to A/B rerank + hybrid search. Pages are PDF page indices (1-based), matching store metadata. Expand this with your own questions — the harness is only as good as the set.

questions.question: What are the SI base units (metre, kilogram, second, ampere)?

expected.doc: Zoran M. Dukic - High-End Tube Amplifier Design - 2025.pdf

questions.question: How is class-A / class-AB push-pull operation described for output stages?

expected.doc: Zoran M. Dukic - High-End Tube Amplifier Design - 2025.pdf
Zoran M. Dukic - High-End Tube Amplifier Design - 2025.pdf
